description: A retail company acquires another, and they want to consolidate their two separate accounts into one.

nodes.task_description: Identify the two customer accounts to be merged.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the details for both accounts.

nodes.task_description: Merge the order history and contact information from the secondary account into the primary account.

expected_outcome.value: All historical data is consolidated under one account.
The old account is marked as inactive.
